message:
🐛 Center all toast messages and convert session-expired to bottom toast (#826)

- Move toast container from bottom-right to bottom-center so toasts
  don't overlap floating UI elements like AI Missions
- Convert session-expired banner from full-width top bar to a centered
  bottom toast matching the standard toast style

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
